strategy_used:

7. Remove heated egg from stove or microwave
8. Go to dishwasher (if available)
9. Retrieve a clean plate from the dishwasher (or wash one if not available)
10. Put heated egg on the plate
11. Go to countertop or table
12. Place the plate with the heated egg on the countertop or table
